title: Spicy Pineapple Skewers
description: A sweet and spicy twist on traditional skewers, featuring juicy pineapple chunks. Perfect for a quick and easy appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: Magical Skewers
ingredients.notes: available at your local magic market

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together spicy marinade ingredients: 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp ground cumin, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1/2 tsp cayenne pepper, 1/4 tsp salt, 1/4 tsp black pepper.
Thread pineapple chunks onto magical skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush skewers with spicy marinade, making sure to coat all pieces evenly.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until pineapple is caramelized and slightly charred.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
